calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for Short Cause Trial sent forthwith from Department 501 against Defendant Davis Jones and Defendant Does 1 to 5.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Jaime; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:59:31 a.m. and concluding at 10:06:44 a.m. (D505)

Francisco Torres, Esq. representing Plaintiff Central Towers Joint Venture LLC.
Defendant Davis Jones not appearing.
Byron Ixcal, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.
Theresa Zhen, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Unlawful Detainer filed on Mar-08-2024.
Notice of time and place of trial and settlement hearing filed and served on Mar-29-2024.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and provides an offer of proof as to witness testimony.
Counsel goes over the amounts sought. Counsel inadvertently calculated the holdover damages incorrectly as February of this year has an extra day. Counsel to compute new total judgment for the Court.
The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2: Ledger
Exhibit 3: 3-day notice to pay or quit.
Exhibit4: Proof of service.
Byron Ixcal is called to testify.
Court examines Mr. Ixcal, witness confirms that statements declarations made are true and correct.
Theresa Zhen is called to testify.
Court examines Ms. Zhen, witness confirms that statements declarations made are true and correct.

After reviewing the declarations, evidence presented, and hearing the testimonies, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant:

Possession of the premises located at
350 Turk Street, Apt T713
San Francisco CA 94102 San Francisco County

and

Past-due rent $5,678.51
Holdover Damages $3,789.60
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $538.00
Total Judgment $10,006.11

Proposed judgment signed as modified and executed this day.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Off Calendar

Request Pending to Waive Court Fees and Costs Pursuant to G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, and 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Text Ruling

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Text Ruling
